channel.title: Algorithmic Thinking & Complexity :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: Thread: Algorithmic Thinking & Complexity Working draft for faculty review. A spiral deepens through escalating passes across blocks. This is the spiral; one of nine spirals (alongside three lenses and one bounded practice). In one line: From Big-O as theory, to graph optimization, to a real bottleneck under load. Character Moved its first pass from B3 to B4 so it can answer the question B3’s contract-first ADTs raise: how do you choose among implementations of the same contract? Closely shadowed by the Optimization lens.
